あら、司令官。こんにちは♪ ふふ、見てください。<br>今日も可愛いお客さんが、:
Oh, Commander, hello!♪ Fufu, please look. We have so many cute little
guests again today.
最近、前線基地にも、ご家族で移り住む方が増えたみたいで……。<br>そこで留守中:
Lately, more families are moving to Frontline Base too... So I gather
the children whose parents are away and sing for them sometimes.
ここは危険と隣り合わせの場所……。<br>でも、だからこそ、子どもたちにはずっと:
This place is always just a step away from danger... But precisely
because of that, I want the children to always keep smiling.
この子たちが大きくなる頃には、もっと平和な世界になっていますように……。<br>:
I hope that by the time these children grow up, the world will be more
peaceful... With that wish in my heart, I always sing.
司令官さまも、お疲れでしょう？ よかったら、一曲聴いていきませんか？<br>未来:
Lord Commander, you must be tired too, right? If you'd like, why not
stay for a song? A song of hope for the future——
